anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Pool basin extracted from architect Rev-D plan dated 2026-05-20; rectangular 10x5m pool; basin floor 1800mm below pool deck level; water surface at 200mm above pool deck per architect's hydraulic schedule.

zones._derivation_note: Zone 0 = pool basin interior (water volume) per §702 zone-table. SELV-only (≤12V) per §702. IPx8 (submersible) required for underwater luminaires. Polygon = pool basin footprint (1000,500)-(11000,5500). Height 0 to water surface (200mm above pool deck = floor reference 0).

Zone 1 = pool basin polygon extended 2m horizontally on all sides per §702 zone-table; vertically from water surface (200mm) to 2.5m AFF. Polygon shown unclipped — runtime intersects with room polygon. IPx5 minimum (splash + jets typical in pool hall).

zones._clause_citation: BS 7671:2018 §702 + §702.55.4 (Zone 2 extension into changing rooms — barrier check)
zones._derivation_note: Zone 2 = further 1.5m horizontal extension of Zone 1 (total 3.5m from pool edge) per §702 zone-table. Vertically from water surface (200mm) to 2.5m AFF. Polygon shown unclipped — south edge at y=-3000 enters the adjacent changing-room polygon (located at y=-3000 to 0). Within 200mm threshold triggers reviewer D-2 (§702.55.4 changing-room barrier check).

electrical_constraints._derivation_note: Main equipotential bonding required for all extraneous conductive parts within the pool hall per §702.415.1. Conductor CSA ≥10mm² (the §702 minimum). Bonding extends to ladder rails, pipe fittings, pool surrounds, and any other extraneous metalwork.

assumptions: Cascade source: standalone C.1 example uk-pool-hall-with-changing-room-adjacency. Synthetic upstream lighting-layout intent supplies 4 IPx5 ceiling luminaires consumed for cross-check.
Water surface at 200mm above pool deck per architect's hydraulic schedule; runtime intersects unclipped zone polygons with the room polygon for plan rendering.
Extraneous parts list expanded beyond the architectural drawing — engineer-of-record to confirm against pool-installer's bonding schedule.
Zone 2 extension uses the §702 zone-table 1.5m-beyond-Zone-1 figure (total 3.5m from pool edge); §702.55.4 changing-room barrier rule check requires engineer confirmation.
_engineering_judgments: REVIEWER D-2: pool_zone_2 south boundary at y=-3000 enters the adjacent 4x3m changing room (located at y=-3000 to 0, x=4000 to 8000 per architectural plan note). The pool_zone_2 boundary extends INTO the changing-room polygon and overlaps it. Per BS 7671:2018 §702.55.4, Zone 2 extension into a changing room is permitted ONLY where a fixed barrier of height ≥2.5m AFF separates the changing room from the pool zone. Engineer-of-record must confirm the presence and compliance of a §702.55.4 fixed barrier. If absent, the changing-room electrical installation inherits Zone 2 IPx4 minimum and the §702.415.1 main equipotential bonding obligation.

invariants.evidence: 1 anchor (pool_main) produces 3 zones (z0+z1+z2). No internal overlaps between pool_zone_0/1/2 declared (concentric zones, treated as nested rings — derivation engine emits separate entries per zone). overlapping_with_zone_ids[] empty for each.

existing_fixtures_audit[] has 4 entries (consumed from upstream lighting-layout intent: 4 IPx5 ceiling luminaires), all compliance_status=compliant. non_compliance_flags[] is empty. One-to-one correspondence holds vacuously (zero violations on both sides).
No medical_envelope_group_2 zone. §710 medical IT system N/A.

room_type=swimming_pool_hall, not bathroom/shower_room/sauna. §701.411.3.3 + §703.411.3.3 RCD blanket rule N/A by this room type — INV-04 covers bath/shower/sauna only per spec §7.2; pool RCD obligation rides on §702 + INV-05 main bonding instead.

room_type=swimming_pool_hall; pool_main_equipotential_bonding constraint present with extraneous_parts_listed[] = 5 items, conductor_csa_min_mm2 = 10 per BS 7671:2018 §702.415.1 (the verified main-bonding clause; the alternate clause number for the same rule is on the spec §3.2 banned-list).
No bath_basin anchor. §701.512.2 whirlpool pump constraint N/A.

4 existing ceiling luminaires consumed from upstream lighting-layout intent + audited against §702 derived zones. Sub-rule (a) type_prohibited: all 4 are luminaire (permitted in pool_zone_1/2 when IPx5+). Sub-rule (b) ip_below_min: all IPx5 ≥ pool_zone_1 IPx5 minimum per §702 zone-table. Sub-rule (c) switch_distance_too_close: N/A — luminaires not sockets. Sub-rule (d) voltage_above_max: 230V ≤ pool_zone_1 max_voltage 230V. All 16 sub-rule evaluations (4 fixtures × 4 sub-rules) PASS. Vertically each fixture sits at z=4500mm ABOVE pool_zone_1 height_max 2500mm — ceiling-mounted outside §702 zone vertical extent — so derived_zone_id=null.

compliant=true ∧ violation_count_critical=0 ∧ non_compliance_flags=[] ∧ no silent zone overlaps. Self-consistency holds (D-2 reviewer judgment surfaced separately in _engineering_judgments[], not as a silent violation).

rationale.chat_summary: Cascade retrofit of C.1 example #4 (uk-pool-hall-with-changing-room-adjacency). Synthetic upstream lighting-layout intent supplies 4 IPx5 ceiling luminaires; all compliant against §702 derived zones (ceiling-mounted above pool_zone_1 height_max). Demonstrates lighting-layout INV-12 PASS hand-off. D-2 changing-room boundary judgment carried forward.

sections.title: Cascade context
sections.summary: Cascade retrofit of C.1 standalone uk-pool-hall-with-changing-room-adjacency. Synthetic upstream lighting-layout intent supplies 4 IPx5 ceiling luminaires (at z=4500mm) for cross-check against §702 pool zones. The pool zone derivation, constraints, and D-2 changing-room boundary judgment are identical to the C.1 source. The cascade hand-off contract: existing_fixtures_audit[] mirrors the consumed luminaire catalogue and the special-locations intent payload propagates non_compliance_flags=[] downstream so lighting-layout INV-12 (cross-check) PASSes.

sections.title: Standards applied
sections.summary: BS 7671:2018+A2:2022 §702 governs swimming pool zoning. §702.415.1 mandates pool main equipotential bonding ≥10mm² to all extraneous-conductive-parts. §702.55.4 governs Zone 2 extension into adjacent changing rooms — requires fixed barrier ≥2.5m AFF for separation.

sections.title: INV-08 sub-rule walk-through
sections.summary: Sub-rule (a) type_prohibited: all 4 luminaires permitted in pool_zone_1/2 when IPx5+. Sub-rule (b) ip_below_min: IPx5 = IPx5 minimum (pool_zone_1 splash-resistant). Sub-rule (c) switch_distance_too_close: N/A (not sockets). Sub-rule (d) voltage_above_max: 230V ≤ 230V. Vertically all 4 sit at z=4500mm > pool_zone_1 height_max 2500mm — ceiling-mounted, technically outside §702 zone vertical envelope; derived_zone_id=null. All 16 sub-rule evaluations PASS.

sections.title: Consumer-side hand-off
sections.summary: When lighting-layout v1.6 consumes this special-locations intent, INV-12 iterates over each consumed_summary luminaire and verifies it does NOT violate any derived §702 zone. All 4 fixtures audit as compliant; lighting-layout INV-12 PASSes. The D-2 reviewer flag for the changing-room boundary is propagated via calculation_summary._engineering_judgments[] — downstream consumers should surface this to the engineer-of-record but it does NOT downgrade the cascade compliant=true verdict.

sections.title: Honest disclosures
sections.summary: Synthetic upstream intent — lighting-layout v1.6 hand-off not yet shipped. D-2 boundary judgment carried forward from C.1 source: pool_zone_2 polygon extends into the adjacent 4x3m changing room at y<0; engineer-of-record must verify §702.55.4 fixed barrier presence. The D-2 flag is informational on the lighting cascade because no luminaire is placed in the boundary-suspect region.
